intended_use: Academic experiments in satellite communications, network protocols, anomaly detection, ML on telemetry

files.description: Raw CCSDS TM housekeeping packets. Parse with 09_ccsds_parser.py
files.fields: battery_V, panel_temp_C, solar_mA, adcs_mode, quaternion, rssi, fault_flag

files.description: TC command frames for ADCS, payload, downlink, and memory management
AOS frames carrying SAR bulk science data. Fixed 1115-byte frames + FECF
Pre-decoded telemetry for direct ML / statistical analysis
files.columns: timestamp_utc, seq, apid, battery_V, panel_temp_C, solar_mA, adcs_mode, rw_rpm, rssi_dBm, orbit_num, fault_flag, q1, q2, cpu_temp_C

files.description: Realistic ISL crosslink log with mixed packet types, routing, timing, user IP, fault alerts
GPS SV ephemeris broadcast packets (RINEX-compatible format)
files.columns: epoch_utc, svid, prn, health, ura_m, toe_s, semi_major_axis_m, eccentricity, ...

files.description: ADCS attitude quaternion time series with angular velocity and Euler angles
files.columns: time_s, q0, q1, q2, q3, wx, wy, wz, roll, pitch, yaw, adcs_mode, pointing_error_arcsec

files.description: Power subsystem telemetry across 5 orbital periods (96 min/orbit)
files.columns: timestamp_utc, battery_V, soc_pct, solar_W, load_W, bus_V, charge_A, discharge_A, panel_temp_C, pcdu_temp_C, eclipse, orbit_phase_deg

files.description: Standalone CCSDS Space Packet parser. Run: python 09_ccsds_parser.py <binary_file>
This file. Dataset documentation and schema reference

timestamp_format: CCSDS TAI (4-byte coarse seconds + 2-byte fine, epoch=2000-01-01T11:58:55.816Z)

anomalies_injected.eclipse_events: File 08 contains 5 eclipse passages per 8-hour window
anomalies_injected.pointing_error_spikes: File 07 contains Gaussian noise on pointing_error_arcsec

suggested_experiments: ML anomaly detection on fault_flag using telemetry time series (File 04)
CCSDS protocol stack implementation and CRC verification (Files 01-03, 09)
ISL routing protocol simulation using stream topology (File 05)
Power budget optimization and eclipse prediction (File 08)
Attitude control system analysis via quaternion kinematics (File 07)
SAR image reconstruction from AOS payload bytes (File 03)
Predictive maintenance on battery SoC degradation (File 08)
